summary: Frontend complete. VS Code workbench layout with ActivityBar, Navigator, EditorGroups, Inspector, StatusBar. PromptEdit with strategy picker and Forge button. ForgeArtifact with result viewer, copy, diff toggle, feedback. ScoreCard with 5-dimension scores and deltas. DiffView side-by-side. CommandPalette on Ctrl+K. ProviderBadge. Error state banners. SSE consumption with reconnection. Live history data from API.
entry_conditions_met: Phase 2 handoff exists with all_passed: true
warnings: Inspector.svelte used primary_framework (nonexistent field) — fixed to strategy_used during verification
Dev server auto-promoted to port 5200 when 5199 was occupied — not a defect, Vite fallback behavior

critical_interfaces: forgeStore.forge() triggers SSE optimization with auto-reconnection
API client: optimizeSSE(), getHistory(), submitFeedback(), getHealth()
CommandPalette opens on Ctrl+K with fuzzy action search
known_limitations: No frontend tests yet (spec calls for them but Phase 3 exit conditions don't require them)
GitHub OAuth redirect flow needs real GitHub OAuth app credentials to test
Refinement UI deferred to Phase 4 (refinement.svelte.ts store + timeline components)
No visual testing or screenshots — visual verification requires running dev server
